name: Steamed Kauai Clams with Lemongrass and Green Curry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Stalk lemongrass, cut into small pieces (1/3 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, combine the white wine, chopped garlic, chopped lemongrass, clam juice, and clams.
2. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and steam until the clams are open.
3. Using a slotted spoon, remove the clams from the broth and set aside.
4. Over high heat, reduce the liquid by one third.
5. Add coconut milk and green curry paste, then mix well.
6. Cook slowly for two to three minutes.
7. Add basil and chili pepper, stirring gently.
8. To serve, place a dozen opened clams in a deep dish or soup plate. Ladle the sauce on top.
